cases.title: Nickoley and Stephens v. Southwest Presbytery
precedent_refs: C. E. Chappell vs. East Carolina Presbytery
Cooke Lewis et. al. vs Grace Presbytery, M9GA (1981) 9-76, p. 150
cases.synopsis: Bruce Nickoley and David Stephens complained against Southwest Presbytery's actions in withdrawing charges against two ruling elders, dissolving a pastoral relationship, and rescinding its suspension of a local church session. The SJC denied the complaint, affirming that the Presbytery correctly determined it lacked constitutional authority to suspend the session or act as a 'Session pro tem' without congregational consent, and that original jurisdiction over charges against ruling elders rested with the local session.
